Our Products
Binding Machines & Supplies
Extensive range of binding machines of all sizes to suit both commercial and home applications.
Creasing & Perforating Machines
Achieve the highest possible quality for your finished stock with our collection of creasing machines.
Guillotines
Manual and electric guillotines to suit small offices to larger print rooms. Free standing machines available.
Index Tabs
Durable, tear-resistant transparent and colour index tabs available in a range of sizes.
Laminators & Laminating Film
Protect and preserve your documents with our pouch and roll laminators, suitable for all applications.
Packaging
Streamline your package operations and cut costs with our commercial-grade paper banding machines, air cushion machines, and tape.
Paper Drills & Supplies
Boost production efficiency with our versatile paper supplies, designed for both commercial and office settings.
Paper Folding Machines
Choose from a range of paper folding machines, including friction/suction feed and crease folding models.
Paper Shredders & Supplies
Secure sensitive documents and prevent fraudulent activities using our range of professional paper shredders.
Electric Pencil Sharpeners
Safe, quiet and simple to operate, our electric pencil sharpeners are perfect for the classroom or office desk
Photo Paper
Available in a variety of paper weights and sizes, this high-gloss, premium photo paper is suitable for all inkjet printers.
Staplers & Staples
High-quality staplers designed for commercial and home offices. Manual and electronic options available.
